scripts.build: cd 'Occasion&garantie/backend' && npm install --no-package-lock && cd ../frontend && npm install --no-package-lock && npm run build && cd .. && node -e "var fs=require('fs'),p=require('path');var src=p.join(process.cwd(),'frontend','dist'),dst=p.join(process.cwd(),'backend','public');if(fs.existsSync(dst))fs.rmSync(dst,{recursive:true});fs.cpSync(src,dst,{recursive:true});console.log('Copied frontend to backend/public')"
